text:
RT @icreatelife: This might be the most personal AI animation I've ever made. 

10 years. New York. Infinite memories. 
Turn your sound on…
Normalize writing kind DMs to people without asking anything in return or any agenda

I asked Claude Opus 4.7 to come up with Analytics page for X app and here's the result. 

Which one do you like more? 
 
Opus 4.7 (left) vs Original (right) https://t.co/xRsse8JuIZ
Got some devastating news 😔 it will mean a lot to me if you share something good that happened to you recently, a sweet photo of a pet or something you made with AI that brings you joy.
